'''Tu-Scart''' was a serpentine bio-engineered beast created by the extragalactic [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of the galaxy. His name literally translated as 'slithering smasher', although he was also known as 'Beater'. He was part of a symbiotic pair known as '[[Biter and Beater]]' with the other being, [[Sgauru]].

==Biology and appearance==
Tu-Scart was the only one of his kind. The 'Serpentine Crusher' resembled a massive elongated [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] and was covered in glossy black scales. His skin was sleek and moist, interrupted only by the bony ridge that ran the length of his spine and served as an anchor point for the chitinous [[Sgauru]]. Two black eyes were set in the sides of his bony skull and a pair of non-venomous fangs protruded from his jaws.

Although calm in the presence of the biotechnology of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], the 'Serpentine Crusher' became vicious when exposed to the technology of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. When deployed onto planetary surfaces, 8 handlers were often required to herd the Tu-Scart off the landing craft, at which point he would begin his rampage. The Beater used the olfactory glands located in his tongue to locate the largest concentrations of enemy targets and instinctually headed in that direction, all the while communicating with Sgauru through a form of mental telepathy similar to that of the [[villip]]s. When assaulting a building, Tu-Scart used his bony head as a battering ram, although he preferred to loop his coils around the structure and crush it to the point of collapse.

==History==
Tu-Scart and Sgauru were created by a group of [[Master Shaper]]s 50 standard years before the Yuuzhan Vong War. Tu-Scart was the 'Beater' while Sgauru was the 'Biter'. According to legend [[Yun-Yammka]], the Slayer, blessed the Master Shapers with the knowledge necessary to create such creatures.

The Slayer ordered the creation of the pair for the use of destroying the monolithic [[Duracrete/Legends|duracrete]] structures in use by the galaxy and to allow the [[Warrior caste]] to attend to more "honorable duties." Due to the 'divine nature' of their conception, Tu-Scart and Sgauru were respected by the Yuuzhan Vong military.

'Beater and Biter' were first deployed against the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] during the [[Evacuation of Rychel]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], and later during the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Duro]] in [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]]. During the battles, Tu-Scart was deployed to smash buildings, also at [[Rychel]], it was used to project fear into the minds of the New Republic troops. Later, New Republic scientists and psychologists involved with the [[Eclipse Station|Eclipse Project]] came to believe that the 'Pair' may have been only deployed for only the most important battles at the command of the [[Warmaster]], [[Tsavong Lah]].

During the [[Battle of Yuuzhan'tar]] in [[29 ABY/Legends|29 ABY]], [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] faced the 'Biter' and the 'Beater'. However, he used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to persuade the [[World Brain]] which controlled them to turn on its Yuuzhan Vong masters. Since the World Brain controlled all the Yuuzhan Vong war beasts present at the battle including the 'pair', it used Sgauru to transport Jacen to [[Shimrra's Citadel]], where the Yuuzhan Vong command was located.

However, this action angered the surrounding [[Chazrach]] slaves whom began pelting both warbeasts with [[Razor bug|razor]] and [[Nang hul|thud bugs]], and [[firejelly]] grenades. Luckily for the 'Beater and Biter', help arrived when the [[rakamat]]s turned on the Chazrach. This chaos allowed the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] forces to recapture the [[Glitannai Esplanade canyon]].
